title: Absence of Information Security Policy
cause: Lack of governance structure and management oversight; Security not prioritized at executive level
event: Organization operates without documented, approved information security policy
consequence: Inconsistent security practices; Regulatory audit failures; No basis for enforcement; Staff unaware of expectations

title: Unclear Security Roles & Responsibilities
cause: No RACI matrix for security; Overlapping or missing responsibilities; No formal security function
event: Security tasks fall through cracks; Conflicting decisions made; Accountability unclear during incidents
consequence: Delayed incident response; Duplicated efforts or gaps; Blame culture; Failed audits

title: Inadequate Segregation of Duties
cause: Small team size; Cost pressures; No SoD policy or technical enforcement
event: Single individual can initiate, approve, and execute sensitive transactions without oversight
consequence: Fraud goes undetected; Errors not caught; Compliance violations; Financial loss

title: No Established Authority Contacts
cause: No documented procedures; Unclear who contacts whom; No relationship building
event: During breach, organization doesn't know how/when to contact law enforcement, regulators, or CERT
consequence: Delayed notification; Regulatory penalties; Missed assistance; Legal exposure

title: No Security Community Engagement
cause: Not a member of ISAC or security forums; No peer information sharing
event: Industry-specific threat campaign targets sector; Organization has no early warning
consequence: Blindsided by attack; No peer support; Miss best practices; Slower detection

title: No Threat Intelligence Program
cause: No threat intel feeds; No analysis capability; Reactive security posture
event: Zero-day or emerging threat exploited before organization aware of its existence
consequence: Successful breach; No indicators to hunt for; Delayed detection

title: Security Not Integrated in Projects
cause: No security gates in project methodology; Security consulted too late; Time pressure
event: New system deployed to production with security vulnerabilities; No threat modeling done
consequence: Vulnerable system exposed; Costly post-deployment remediation; Breach via new system

title: Undocumented Operating Procedures
cause: Tribal knowledge; Staff turnover; No documentation requirements
event: Key person unavailable; Team cannot perform critical security operations correctly
consequence: Operational errors; Extended outages; Security gaps during absence

title: Unauthorized Production Changes
cause: No change management process; Emergency changes not tracked; Developer direct access
event: Unapproved change introduces vulnerability or causes outage
consequence: Service disruption; Security hole introduced; No rollback plan; Audit failure

title: Unknown Shadow IT Assets
cause: Easy cloud provisioning; No shadow IT policy; Decentralized purchasing
event: Business unit deploys SaaS with customer data without IT knowledge or security review
consequence: Unknown attack surface; Data breach via unsecured service; Compliance violation

title: Misuse of Information Assets
cause: No acceptable use policy; No monitoring; Unclear boundaries
event: Employee uses corporate systems for unauthorized purposes (mining, personal business, piracy)
consequence: Legal liability; Malware introduction; Resource consumption; Reputation damage

title: Assets Not Returned at Termination
cause: No asset return process; No offboarding checklist; Remote employee
event: Terminated employee retains corporate laptop, phone, or access tokens with sensitive data
consequence: Data breach; IP theft; Continued access risk; Compliance violation

title: Misclassified Sensitive Data
cause: No classification policy; No training; Complex data landscape
event: PII or financial data classified as 'internal' instead of 'confidential', stored without encryption
consequence: Data breach with unprotected sensitive data; Regulatory fines; Notification costs

title: Insecure Data Transfer
cause: No encryption requirements; Legacy systems; User convenience
event: Sensitive data transmitted over unencrypted channel (HTTP, FTP, plain email)
consequence: Data intercepted; Credential theft; Man-in-the-middle attack success

title: Improper Data Deletion
cause: No data retention policy; No secure deletion procedures; Storage cost is cheap
event: Data retained beyond legal requirement or recovered after 'deletion'
consequence: Privacy violation; Legal discovery issues; Storage of unnecessary risk

title: Unmasked Data in Non-Production
cause: No test data management; Convenience; No masking tools
event: Production data with real PII copied to development/test environment
consequence: Wider exposure of sensitive data; Developer access to PII; Compliance violation

title: Weak Authentication Controls
cause: No password policy; No MFA; User convenience prioritized
event: Attacker compromises account via credential stuffing, brute force, or phishing
consequence: Unauthorized access; Account takeover; Lateral movement; Data theft

title: Excessive User Privileges
cause: No least privilege policy; Role explosion; No access reviews
event: User or compromised account has access far beyond job requirements
consequence: Insider data theft; Compromised account causes massive breach; Fraud

title: Orphaned Accounts After Termination
cause: No automated JML process; HR-IT disconnect; No regular reviews
event: Terminated employee's account remains active for days/weeks/months
consequence: Former employee accesses systems; Sells access; Commits sabotage

title: Shared or Generic Accounts
cause: Legacy systems; Convenience; Cost of licenses
event: Malicious action performed via shared account; Cannot identify responsible individual
consequence: No accountability; Audit failure; Cannot prosecute; Passwords widely known

title: Third-Party Data Breach
cause: No vendor security assessment; Reliance on self-attestation; No ongoing monitoring
event: Vendor with access to customer data suffers breach; Organization's data exposed
consequence: Data breach notification; Regulatory fines; Legal liability; Reputation damage

title: Supply Chain Software Compromise
cause: No supply chain verification; Blind trust in updates; No SBOM
event: Malicious code inserted into software update or open-source library (SolarWinds, Log4j style)
consequence: Backdoor access to all systems running software; Massive breach; APT persistence

title: Vendor Access Abuse
cause: Excessive vendor permissions; No monitoring; Shared vendor accounts
event: Malicious vendor employee or compromised vendor account steals data or installs backdoor
consequence: Data theft; Persistent backdoor; IP loss; Hard to detect (legitimate user)

title: Insecure Cloud Service Usage
cause: No cloud security policy; Shared responsibility misunderstanding; Default configurations
event: Cloud storage misconfigured as public; Cloud service used without security controls
consequence: Data exposed to internet; Massive breach; Regulatory violation

title: Insecure Outsourced Development
cause: No security requirements for vendors; No code review; Cost-focused selection
event: Third-party developed code contains vulnerabilities or backdoors
consequence: Vulnerable application in production; Backdoor access; Costly remediation

title: Cloud Admin Account Compromise
cause: No MFA on admin accounts; Weak password; Phishing
event: Attacker gains access to cloud admin console (AWS root, Azure Global Admin)
consequence: Complete cloud environment compromise; Data exfiltration; Massive bills; Ransomware

title: Cloud Misconfiguration
cause: No cloud security baseline; Infrastructure as Code not reviewed; Default settings
event: S3 bucket public; Security group allows 0.0.0.0/0; Database exposed
consequence: Data breach; Cryptomining; Regulatory fines; Reputational damage

title: Shared Responsibility Gaps
cause: Misunderstanding of cloud shared responsibility model; Assumed provider handles security
event: Security control not implemented because each party thought the other was responsible
consequence: Security gap exploited; Breach with unclear liability; Finger-pointing

title: Inadequate Background Screening
cause: No screening policy; Cost concerns; Fast hiring pressure
event: Employee with criminal history or false credentials hired into sensitive role
consequence: Fraud; Data theft; Embezzlement; Regulatory violation

title: Missing Security Terms in Employment
cause: HR contracts not reviewed by security; Boilerplate contracts; No NDA
event: Employee leaves and shares confidential information; No legal recourse
consequence: IP theft with no remedy; Competitive intelligence loss; Cannot prosecute

title: No Disciplinary Process for Violations
cause: No policy enforcement; HR reluctance; Unclear consequences
event: Security violations occur repeatedly without consequence; Culture of non-compliance
consequence: Increased risk acceptance; More violations; Audit findings; Eventual breach

title: Insecure Termination Process
cause: No offboarding checklist; HR-IT disconnect; Remote termination challenges
event: Access not revoked timely; Assets not returned; Knowledge not transferred
consequence: Former employee retains access; Data theft; Sabotage; IP loss

title: Phishing Attack Success
cause: No security awareness training; No phishing simulations; User trust
event: Employee clicks phishing link, enters credentials, or opens malicious attachment
consequence: Credential theft; Malware infection; BEC wire fraud; Ransomware entry point

title: Social Engineering Success
cause: No verification procedures; Helpful culture exploited; No awareness
event: Attacker manipulates employee via phone, in-person, or online to bypass controls
consequence: Unauthorized access; Physical entry; Information disclosure; Wire transfer

title: Security Events Not Reported
cause: No reporting culture; Fear of blame; Don't know what to report
event: Employee observes suspicious activity but doesn't report it; Early warning missed
consequence: Breach continues undetected; Extended dwell time; Greater damage

title: Insecure Remote Working
cause: No remote work policy; No VPN requirement; Personal devices used
event: Remote worker accesses corporate data over insecure home network or public WiFi
consequence: Credential interception; Data leakage; Malware from home network

title: Mobile Device Theft/Loss
cause: No MDM; No encryption requirement; No remote wipe
event: Employee's phone or laptop with corporate data lost or stolen
consequence: Data breach from unencrypted device; Credential exposure; Notification required

title: Unauthorized Physical Access
cause: No access controls; Tailgating; Lost/stolen badges
event: Unauthorized person gains physical access to office, server room, or secure area
consequence: Equipment theft; Data theft; Physical tampering; Device implants

title: No Physical Security Monitoring
cause: No CCTV; No guards; No intrusion detection
event: Physical security incident occurs with no evidence; Intrusion goes undetected
consequence: Cannot investigate; No deterrence; Insurance claim denied

title: Sensitive Information Left Visible
cause: No clear desk policy; No screen lock; Open office environment
event: Sensitive information on screens or desks observed by unauthorized visitors
consequence: Information disclosure; Social engineering enablement; Compliance violation

title: Insecure Work in Secure Areas
cause: No visitor escort; No secure area procedures; Tailgating allowed
event: Unauthorized activities or unescorted visitors in secure areas (data center, vault)
consequence: Equipment tampering; Data theft; Shoulder surfing; Device installation

title: Environmental Damage to Systems
cause: Inadequate environmental controls; No fire suppression; Flood-prone location
event: Fire, flood, or other environmental event damages IT equipment
consequence: Hardware destruction; Data loss; Extended outage; Recovery costs

title: Supporting Utilities Failure
cause: No UPS; No generator; Single utility feed; No redundant cooling
event: Power outage or HVAC failure causes system shutdown or hardware damage
consequence: Service outage; Data corruption; Hardware failure from heat

title: Cabling Security Failure
cause: No cable management; Exposed cabling; No cable labeling
event: Network cables damaged, disconnected accidentally, or tapped
consequence: Service disruption; Data interception; Troubleshooting delays

title: Equipment Theft
cause: No physical security; No cable locks; No asset tracking
event: Laptop, server, or other equipment stolen from office or during transport
consequence: Data breach from stolen device; Asset loss; Business disruption

title: Improper Media Handling
cause: No media handling policy; No encryption for removable media
event: USB drive or backup tape with sensitive data lost, stolen, or mishandled
consequence: Data breach; Compliance violation; Unable to locate data

title: Insecure Equipment Disposal
cause: No disposal procedures; No data sanitization; Donated/sold equipment
event: Decommissioned equipment disposed of with data still recoverable
consequence: Data breach from recovered data; Compliance violation

title: Unmanaged BYOD Devices
cause: No MDM; No BYOD policy; User convenience
event: Personal device with corporate data compromised by malware or stolen
consequence: Data breach via personal device; No remote wipe; Malware spread

title: Unauthorized Software Installation
cause: Admin rights given to users; No application whitelisting
event: User installs unauthorized or malicious software on corporate device
consequence: Malware infection; Vulnerable software; License violation

title: USB-Based Attack
cause: USB ports not disabled; No device control; Curiosity
event: Malicious USB device inserted (dropped in parking lot, sent as gift)
consequence: Malware infection; Data exfiltration; Keyboard injection attack

title: Ransomware Infection
cause: No EDR; Unpatched systems; Successful phishing; No segmentation
event: Ransomware encrypts files across network; Ransom demanded
consequence: Business shutdown; Data loss; Ransom payment; Recovery costs; Reputation damage

title: Persistent Malware/RAT Infection
cause: No EDR behavioral detection; No network monitoring
event: Malware establishes persistence; Attacker maintains long-term access
consequence: Data exfiltration over time; Espionage; Staging for later attack

title: Weak Network Segmentation
cause: Flat network; Legacy architecture; No micro-segmentation
event: Attacker or malware moves laterally from initial foothold to critical systems
consequence: Small breach becomes total compromise; Ransomware spreads everywhere

title: Insecure Network Services
cause: Unnecessary services running; Default configurations; No hardening
event: Attacker exploits vulnerable network service (SMB, RDP, Telnet)
consequence: Network compromise; Credential theft; Remote code execution

title: No Web Content Filtering
cause: No proxy; No DNS filtering; Direct internet access
event: User accesses malicious website; Drive-by download; C2 communication succeeds
consequence: Malware infection; Data exfiltration; Cryptominer installation

title: Unpatched Critical Vulnerability
cause: No vulnerability management program; Slow patching; Change aversion
event: Known critical CVE exploited in production system
consequence: Remote code execution; Data breach; Ransomware; Network compromise

title: Misconfigured Systems
cause: No hardening standards; Default configurations; No compliance scanning
event: Attacker exploits default credentials, unnecessary services, or weak settings
consequence: Unauthorized access; Service compromise; Network entry point

title: Zero-Day Exploitation
cause: No threat intelligence; No behavioral detection; Single-layer defense
event: Attacker uses unknown vulnerability before patch available
consequence: Breach with no signature-based detection; Delayed response

title: Missing Security Requirements
cause: No security in requirements phase; Functional focus only
event: Application built without authentication, authorization, or encryption requirements
consequence: Fundamentally insecure application; Costly redesign needed

title: Insecure Code Deployed
cause: No secure coding training; No code review; No SAST
event: Application deployed with SQLi, XSS, or other code vulnerabilities
consequence: Data breach; Account takeover; Website defacement

title: No Security Testing Before Release
cause: No pen test requirement; Time pressure; Security as afterthought
event: Vulnerabilities discovered in production instead of before release
consequence: Production breach; Emergency patching; Reputation damage

title: No Environment Separation
cause: Cost savings; Convenience; Resource constraints
event: Dev changes affect production; Developers access production data
consequence: Service disruption; Data exposure to developers; Compliance violation

title: Vulnerable Third-Party Libraries
cause: No SCA; No dependency management; No SBOM
event: Application uses library with known critical vulnerability (Log4j, Struts)
consequence: Remote code execution; Data breach; Compliance violation

title: Source Code Exposure
cause: Public repo with secrets; No access controls; Insider
event: Source code with credentials, keys, or proprietary logic exposed
consequence: Credential compromise; IP theft; Vulnerability disclosure

title: Insecure API
cause: API security not addressed; No authentication; No rate limiting
event: API exploited for data extraction, abuse, or injection
consequence: Mass data breach; Service abuse; Account enumeration

title: Weak Encryption Algorithms
cause: Legacy systems; No cryptographic standards; Ignorance
event: Sensitive data protected by weak/broken encryption (DES, MD5, SHA-1)
consequence: Data decryption by attacker; Password cracking; Compliance failure

title: Poor Key Management
cause: No key management process; Keys in code; No rotation
event: Encryption keys compromised, lost, or found in source code
consequence: All encrypted data exposed; Need to re-encrypt everything

title: No Security Logging
cause: Logging not enabled; Logs not collected; Storage costs
event: Security incident occurs with no log evidence
consequence: Cannot investigate; Unknown scope; Cannot prove compliance; No prosecution

title: No Security Monitoring/SIEM
cause: No SIEM; Logs not analyzed; No alerting
event: Attack progresses without detection; Logs exist but nobody watching
consequence: Extended dwell time; Greater damage; Breach discovered externally

title: Inconsistent System Time
cause: No NTP configuration; Mixed time zones; Drift
event: Log correlation fails during investigation; Events cannot be sequenced
consequence: Ineffective forensics; Audit findings; Cannot reconstruct timeline

title: No Incident Response Plan
cause: No IR planning; No team; No playbooks
event: Major security incident occurs; No coordinated response; Chaos
consequence: Extended incident duration; Greater damage; Poor communication; Legal exposure

title: Evidence Contamination/Loss
cause: No forensic procedures; Untrained responders; Evidence mishandled
event: Forensic evidence contaminated, lost, or inadmissible
consequence: Cannot determine scope; Cannot prosecute; Insurance denied; Unknown cause

title: No Lessons Learned Process
cause: No post-incident review; Move on quickly; Blame culture
event: Same type of incident occurs repeatedly; Root cause never addressed
consequence: Repeated breaches; Wasted remediation; Audit findings

title: Failed Backup Recovery
cause: Backups not tested; Corrupted backups; Wrong data backed up
event: Need to restore from backup; Discovery that backups are unusable
consequence: Permanent data loss; Extended outage; Business failure potential

title: No Disaster Recovery Plan
cause: No DR site; No DR testing; Single location dependency
event: Major disaster (fire, flood, ransomware) destroys primary site
consequence: Complete business shutdown; No recovery path; Potential business failure

title: Inadequate ICT Continuity
cause: IT not included in BCP; RTO/RPO not defined; No redundancy
event: Business disruption occurs; IT systems cannot recover in time
consequence: Extended outage beyond business tolerance; SLA breaches; Revenue loss

title: GDPR/Privacy Non-Compliance
cause: No privacy program; No DPO; Unknown data processing
event: Data subject complaint; Regulatory investigation; Privacy breach
consequence: Fines up to 4% global revenue; Enforcement action; Reputation damage

title: Intellectual Property Loss
cause: No IP protection; Weak access controls; No monitoring
event: Trade secrets, source code, or proprietary information stolen
consequence: Competitive disadvantage; Legal costs; Revenue impact

title: Inadequate Records Management
cause: No retention policy; Records destroyed early or kept too long
event: Cannot produce records for legal discovery; Holding data beyond legal basis
consequence: Adverse legal ruling; Regulatory penalty; Compliance failure

title: No Independent Security Review
cause: No internal audit; No third-party assessment; Self-assessment only
event: Systemic security weaknesses remain undetected until breach or external audit
consequence: Certification failure; Hidden vulnerabilities; Audit findings
